Validator Name: Nodedog

Nodedog delivers reliable staking and validation solutions for next-generation blockchain networks. With a strong focus on security and consistent uptime, we ensure your assets operate efficiently and securely.

Networks Currently Validating:
- AtomOne (ATONE)

Digital Presence:
Website: https://nodedog.io
GitHub: https://github.com/nodedogg

Contact:
Telegram: https://t.me/nodedog
Discord: iron32850

Why Validating on gno.land:
At Nodedog, we are excited about gno.land's innovative approach to smart contracts through the Gno language and its unique execution environment.

Contributions to gno.land:
- Early network participation
- Knowledge sharing
- Community building
- Infrastructure development

I've been interested in blockchain technology for about 7 years now. I started out as a regular user, then gradually moved to the other side - contributing and actually building.

Over the years I've taken part in testing phases for a good number of projects, helping some of them get off the ground. Along the way I've run nodes across different networks - Cosmos ecosystem chains, other L1s and L2s, Polkadot, Algorand, and more. Honestly, I've lost count of how many at this point.

Currently I'm running validators on a couple of mainnets, including Redbelly, and I'm also a validator on Safrochain mainnet.

Gno.land stands out to me - the project feels solid and the vision behind it is genuinely exciting. I'd like to contribute as much as I can, whether that's running infrastructure, testing, or just being a reliable part of the network.

Wishing the team continued success.

Twitter/X: https://x.com/zardozmonopoly

At Primestake.top, we are particularly excited about gno.land's innovative approach to smart contract development through the Gno language. This execution model represents the kind of technical evolution we actively support within blockchain ecosystems.

Why It Matters:
Our approach ensures gno.land has both strong infrastructure and long-term ecosystem support. We focus on performance optimization, knowledge sharing, and resilient validator architecture.

ZeycaNode is an independent validator with over 5 years of experience running blockchain infrastructure. Currently validating NEAR Protocol Mainnet (45,000+ NEAR staked, ~$100,000 TVL), Safrochain Mainnet (900,000+ SAF Foundation delegation), Humanode, Pactus and 0G. Infrastructure is hosted on enterprise-grade dedicated servers with hardened security, SSH key-only authentication, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring and automated alerting to ensure maximum uptime and reliability. Beyond validator operations, ZeycaNode contributes technical documentation, node deployment guides, monitoring tools and educational content to support node operators and the broader blockchain ecosystem. ZeycaNode believes gno.land's Proof-of-Contribution model represents the future of decentralized infrastructure and is committed to supporting the ecosystem as a long-term validator and infrastructure partner.

Cumulo is a professional validator operating infrastructure across multiple networks, including Celestia, Espresso Network, Cosmos Hub, Dymension, Axone, Warden, Quicksilver, Seda, Avail, Starknet, Concordium, Fuel, and XRP EVM on mainnet, and Genlayer and IMUA on testnet. Why Gno.land? We see Gno.land as a technically unique project with a strong vision around Go-based smart contracts and Proof of Contribution. As active Cosmos validators, we want to contribute to the strength of this ecosystem and support its growth at an early stage. Contributions: We can contribute through validator infrastructure, ecosystem tooling, and community growth. We provide reliable validation, monitoring, upgrade support, snapshots, public endpoints, dashboards, and transparent activity reporting. We also focus on education and onboarding: Cumulo manages a developer community of 500+ mostly Spanish-speaking members, a Medium with 700+ followers, and an X account with 1.6K+ followers. We use these channels to create guides, translations, technical content, and ecosystem updates to introduce Gno.land to new builders, validators, and contributors. Infrastructure: Dedicated bare-metal servers, Ubuntu 24.04, Prometheus/Grafana and Tenderduty monitoring. Website: https://cumulo.pro | Twitter: https://x.com/Cumulo_pro | Discord: mon.cumulo.pro, sami.cumulo.pro

Inter Blockchain Services Dpos validator , Top IBC Relayer and Infra provider

Inter Blockchain Services Dpos validator and top IBC Relayer of COSMOS ecosystem #IBCGANG.

## Networks We Currently Validate

- Axelar - VP: 8M AXL
- AtomOne - VP: 323K ATONE
- CosmosHub - VP: 20K ATOM
- Band protocol - VP: 218K BAND
- DungeonChain - VP: 14M DGN
- Fetch - VP: 1.1M FET

- Lava - VP: 7M LAVA

- Provenance - VP: 70.5M HASH
- TX - VP: 9M TX

## Digital Presence

- https://ibs.team
- https://x.com/IBSvalidator
- https://github.com/Inter-Blockchain-Service
- Discord: @remiinterblockchainservices, @jayinterblockchainservices

Through our community manager, IBS publishes high-quality educational articles to help users, delegators, and ecosystem participants understand blockchain networks, validator operations, and cross-chain infrastructure.

## Contact Details

Private message via Discord or contact@ibs.team

## Motivation & Contributions

Inter Blockchain Services is a long-standing Cosmos infrastructure operator. We are motivated to validate on gno.land by its vision of transparent, sovereign, and community-driven blockchain infrastructure. The network's governance model aligns with how we operate across the ecosystems we support.

IBS will contribute through reliable validator operations and active community engagement. Our community manager produces educational content to help users and delegators understand the networks we support, and we intend to bring the same approach to gno.land.

We have been an IBC relayer since the early days of the protocol and remain among the top five relayers in the Cosmos ecosystem. That experience in cross-chain infrastructure, monitoring, and uptime management is part of what we bring to gno.land.

HusoNode LTD — a registered company operating professional validator infrastructure.

🌐 Networks & Operations
HusoNode has participated in 75+ networks across different stages such as testnets, mainnets, validator programs and early network support. Networks we actively validate include Espresso, Pharos, Lumera, Safrochain, Limonata, Nesa, Netrum and gno.land.

We currently secure over $1.5M in total delegated stake across the networks we validate.

🛠 Infrastructure
Self-hosted bare-metal servers in a data-center environment, with redundant storage, 24/7 monitoring and alerting, and fast turnaround on upgrades and emergency patches. Each network runs in its own isolated environment with independent key custody.

🔗 Digital Presence
* Website: https://husonode.xyz
* Explorer: https://explorer.husonode.xyz
* GitHub: https://github.com/aksamlan
* X (Twitter): https://x.com/husonode
* Telegram: https://t.me/huseyinntr

📧 Contact
* Email: contact@husonode.xyz

💡 Why gno.land?
We believe in the long-term vision of gno.land and want to contribute by running reliable infrastructure and supporting the ecosystem from the early stages. We have been validating since Test13 and are migrating to Topaz with the same operator address.

💡 Why gno.land? gno.land brings deterministic, composable smart contracts in Go with transparent, community-driven governance. As a statistician specializing in optimization and distributed systems, this developer-first culture aligns with our data-driven, high-availability approach to infrastructure.
🛠️ Contributions & Plans
Public Tooling: Open-sourced Gno Node Doctor (bare-metal/config health checker) and Gno Node Watchdog (Telegram-alerting monitoring daemon) for Test13 operators.
Infrastructure: Enterprise bare-metal servers, firewalled P2P access, key-based SSH only.
Ecosystem Support: Planning public RPC/API endpoints and fast state-sync snapshots.
Governance: Active, data-backed participation in on-chain governance.

Validator Name: Apollo

Networks Validated:
Mainnet: AtomOne, Celestia, Bitway, Jackal, Axone, Arkeo, Realio, Massa, Quicksilver, Nomic, Terp etc.
Testnet: AtomOne, Celestia, Axone, Arkeo, Kira, Cardchain, Nomic etc.
Total Assets Under Management (AuM): approximately $500,000.

Digital Presence & Contacts:
- Web-site: https://apollo-validator.eu/
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/petr_zelivsky
- GitHub: https://github.com/Zelivsky
- Telegram: @Zelivsky
- Discord: zelivsky
- Email: apollo.validator@gmail.com

Why I Am Interested in Validating on Gno.land:
Gno.land represents one of the few truly innovative and ideological blockchain projects in the current landscape. I am particularly drawn to its technical novelties — the Gnolang language and the Proof of Contribution concept — as well as to the philosophical foundation laid by Jae Kwon, whose ideas on decentralization deeply resonate with me.
In an age of increasing corporate control over technology and data, I believe Gno.land embodies the effort to preserve autonomy, transparency, and the open nature of the internet. Supporting this project means supporting the freedom of digital communities to self-govern, innovate, and evolve independently of centralized powers.

Contributions to Gno.land:
I actively participate in the Gno.land testnet, running a stable validator node and helping strengthen the network’s resilience and decentralization. I also share technical knowledge and updates within the validator community, contributing to the project’s visibility and understanding. In addition, I am committed to providing reliable infrastructure, maintaining uptime, and assisting new participants by sharing operational experience.

Summary:
Apollo is an independent validator driven by genuine belief in decentralization and technological progress. Through participation in Gno.land, I aim to contribute both technically and ideologically to a more transparent and self-organizing digital world.

# AVIAONE.com 🟢

AviaOne 🟢 is a trusted professional validator since 2021. Security-focused infrastructure with tokens remaining in delegators' wallets at all times. Ventures & Investors: sales@aviaone.com.

## Why Validating on Gno.land

Having successfully participated in both Testnet11 and Testnet13, we are committed to supporting the Gno.land Mainnet through reliable validator infrastructure and continued development of community tools such as GnoDuty and GnoWatch to strengthen the ecosystem.
